revision.comment: remove word "possibly" in title if parameter 'certain' is passed per 2022-04-13 [[Template talk:Original research inline#Template-protected edit request on 13 April 2022|edit request]] ([[Special:Permalink/1082556834#Template-protected edit request on 13 April 2022|permalink]])
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{OR}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research | title = The material near this tag {{#if:{{{certain|}}}||possibly}} contains original research. | text = original research{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = [[Category:All articles that may contain original research]] | cat-date = Category:Articles that may contain original research}}<!--{{OR}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{OR}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research | title = The material near this tag {{#if:{{{certain|}}}||possibly}} contains original research. | text = original research{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles that may contain original research}}<!--{{OR}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:All articles that may contain original research]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{OR}} begin-->{{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research | title = The material near this tag {{#if:{{{certain|}}}||possibly}} contains original research. | text = original research{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles that may contain original research}}<!--{{OR}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles that may contain original research]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24951476559|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= {{Fix | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:substcheck}}</includeonly> | link = Wikipedia:No original research | title = The material near this tag {{#if:{{{certain|}}}||possibly}} contains original research. | text = original research{{ safesubst:<noinclude/>#if:{{{certain|}}}||?}} | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = | cat-date = Category:Articles that may contain original research}} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:All articles that may contain original research]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
